channel.title: Winpe on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Winpe on Have an average day :|

item.title: Adding UltraVNC to WinPE in MDT2012
item.description: So I’ve been trying to update WinPE images to run UltraVNC for the last day. I’m hit a wall where I can’t make it run automagically in the task sequence. I’ve documented some of it on Serverfault. If I figure it out I’ll but everything on the wiki and update this post. However if you have an idea please let me know! -H
